phytotomy.d: n. The dissection of plants; vegetable anatomy.

phytotoxin.d: n any substance produced by plants that is similar in its properties to extracellular bacterial toxin

phytotoxin tests.t: [医] 植物毒素试验, 马克特氏试验(检血液病)

phytoxylin.t: [医] 植木胶(一种类似火棉胶的物质)

phytozoon.d:
n. A plantlike animal. The term is sometimes applied to
   zoophytes.
